content:
MODULE: cosmos.compliance.policy_engine
FILE: cosmos/compliance/policy_engine.py (584 lines)
CATEGORY: compliance

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Policy Engine

"Every action must be approved by at least three forms filled in triplicate!"

Policy as Code enforcement engine.

CLASSES:
- PolicyEffect(Enum): Policy decision effects.
- PolicyScope(Enum): Policy application scope.
- PolicyCondition: A condition in a policy rule.
- PolicyRule: A single rule within a policy.
  Methods: def evaluate(self, context: Dict) -> Optional[PolicyEffect]
- Policy: A policy with multiple rules.
  Methods: def evaluate(self, context: Dict) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict
- PolicyDecision: Result of a policy evaluation.
- PolicyEngine: Policy as Code enforcement engine.

Features:
- Define policies in YAML or JSON

  Methods: def add_policy(self, policy: Policy)
  Methods: def get_policy(self, policy_id: str) -> Optional[Policy]
  Methods: def list_policies(self, scope: PolicyScope=None, enabled_only: bool=True) -> List[Policy]
  Methods: def delete_policy(self, policy_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def load_policy_from_yaml(self, yaml_path: Path) -> Optional[Policy]
  Methods: def export_policy_to_yaml(self, policy_id: str, output_path: Path)
  Methods: def evaluate(self, context: Dict, policy_ids: List[str]=None) -> PolicyDecision
  Methods: def check_permission(self, user_id: str, action: str, resource: str, **kwargs) -> PolicyDecision
